concerns.analysis: The source PDF contains a meaningful official logo (the Mitchell County Seal) and two handwritten signatures which serve as visual evidence of adoption. In the HTML output, these meaningful images are missing and have been replaced by generic, unidentifiable black icons. While these may be placeholders, they fail to present the meaningful visual content (the logo's details and the handwritten nature of the signatures) required for visual fidelity.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF contains a circular colored seal 'MITCHELL COUNTY 1861 NORTH CAROLINA' in the header and two handwritten signatures above the names Taylor McCurry and Steve Pitman.
concerns.output_quote: The HTML output shows a generic black icon at the top of the document where the seal should be, and two similar icons preceding the signature names.
concerns.location: Header and signature block at the end of the document.
